propositions: The rebar-gerrit-alerts SNS email subscription must be confirmed and delivering (PendingConfirmation=false) so alarms actually notify.
No terraform drift-detection CI exists, allowing committed-but-unapplied HCL to sit unnoticed, which was the root cause of the earlier undeployed-alarm gap.
A least-privilege plan-only IAM role (rebar-terraform-plan) authenticated via GitHub OIDC is needed to run terraform plan in CI without apply/write permissions.
A drift-detection workflow must run terraform plan with -detailed-exitcode on PRs, pushes to main, a daily schedule, and manual dispatch, failing on any non-empty plan.
A live but unmanaged alarm (rebar-gerrit-data-disk-high) with an empty alarm_actions list must be codified into HCL, wired to the SNS topic, and imported into state to close the silent-alarm gap.
The drift sweep surfaced a real pre-existing unapplied aws_instance.gerrit user_data change that must be reconciled in-place to make the drift gate green.
